channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump hobbled top cyber agency just as AI learned to hack
item.description: The U.S. government's lead civilian cyber agency is heading into the AI era with shrinking resources and a diminished role as Washington scrambles to ...

item.title: Behind the Curtain: Trump's irreversible choices
item.description: President Trump has proudly expanded presidential power in unprecedented ways. But it is the choices he has made with that power—of...

item.title: The bond market is telling us the free lunch is over
item.description: For most of this century, wealthy nations have enjoyed a seemingly free lunch: They could spend freely, cut taxes at will, and stimulate their...

item.title: Scoop: Rubio aide promoted to top White House national security post
item.description: Mike Needham, a longtime aide to Secretary of State Marco Rubio, has been promoted to a top national security role in the White House, Axios has learned...
